title: erigeron paucilobus
intro: Erigeron paucilobus, also known as the few-leaved fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Erigeron paucilobus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and salves, which can be used to relieve pain and promote healing.
